installCommand: cd app && echo PRE && (head -3 node_modules/next/package.json || true) && rm -rf node_modules && npm ci && echo POST && head -3 node_modules/next/package.json
buildCommand: cd app && echo BUILD && head -3 node_modules/next/package.json && rm -rf .next .turbo && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.postgres.prisma && next build --webpack
